allow: Bash(node -e "const ac = require\(''@apollo/client''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ac\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''use''\) || k.includes\(''Apollo''\) || k.includes\(''Provider''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
